# Adbnik v1.0.2

## Highlights

- **Project website:** New production-style GitHub Pages site (`docs/index.html` + `docs/css/site.css`): hero, feature grid, install snippet, screenshots, footer links, responsive layout. `docs/.nojekyll` ensures static deployment without Jekyll processing.

## Install

```bat
py -m pip install --upgrade adbnik==1.0.2
```

**Full changelog:** [CHANGELOG.md — 1.0.2](https://github.com/nvnkennedy/adbnik/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
